description: This file defines the main dashboard page component for the student dashboard frontend, rendering user-specific information such as courses, upcoming assignments, grades, and announcements with data fetched asynchronously.

methods.name: formatDate
methods.description: Formats an ISO date string into a readable date string.

methods.name: AssignmentRow
methods.description: A React component representing a row for an assignment, displaying title, due date, course info, and status badge.

methods.name: AnnouncementRow
methods.description: A React component representing a single announcement, displaying title, body, author, and publication date.

methods.name: GradeRow
methods.description: A React component representing a grade summary, showing course code, title, and percentage with a progress bar.

methods.name: Home
methods.description: The main React component for the dashboard page, fetching and displaying user data, and rendering various sections of the dashboard.
